title: Whirls and twirls
restrictions: Claude-proposed pick, confirmed with the user. Bold organic spiralling gestures via the new `whirls` generator: hand-drawn log-spiral WHIRLS of varied size and spin direction + small TWIRL flourishes, composed asymmetrically with open negative space. Leans into the energetic directional-SWIRL that has been winning (R25 currents, R17 diagonal energy, R11 flow) — dynamic and hand-made, NOT a mechanical spirograph and NOT a dense texture. Monochrome black on white. The 16 span whirl count (one giant -> busy field), size (bold -> small twirls), spin mix, squash, and hand energy — kept open/light.
